summary: Unit4 FP&A is a cloud-native FP&A platform for services-led, people-centric organizations—integrated financial planning with a single source of truth for confident decision-making (unit4.com/products/budget-and-forecasting-software).

data.headline: Cloud FP&A platform for Financial Planning & Analysis
data.subheadline: Plan smarter. Forecast reliably. Report accurately.

children.text: Unit4 FP&A is a cloud-native FP&A platform designed for services-led, people-centric organizations. It consolidates data, automates analysis, and delivers a single source of truth so finance teams can move beyond spreadsheet dependency—with AI-driven insights, streamlined workflows, and industry-ready models for budgeting, forecasting, consolidation, and reporting.

create.title: Trusted data and a single source of truth
create.subtitle: Highlights from unit4.com FP&A product pages.

children.text: Smarter planning, budgeting, forecasting, reporting and financial analysis—with efficiency and flexibility for teams to collaborate and make better decisions faster.
Align operational, strategic and financial planning with a single source of truth. Improve visibility, raise productivity through automation, and lower operating costs by unifying processes.
Integrate data from different sources, view actuals, plans and forecasts, drill down to root causes, and track performance across strategic drivers—with automated analysis to save time.

data.quote: Unit4 FP&A is a quantum step forward for the Trust. We now benefit from consistent, collaborative, and accurate planning. The automation saves about three weeks during the budget setting process. And it saves us at least one week in terms of pulling all the forecasts together.
data.authorTitle: Finance Manager, NHS Bedfordshire Hospitals Foundation Trust
